prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-11INPLASTICSTAKES-ORG-6PK-BUN Product Type: ANCHOR_STAKE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 6pk Orange Heavy Duty ABS Plastic Tent Stakes Ground Anchor Camping Essentials, 11 Inch Description: Holding power, durability, terrain diversity, as well as easy installation and packability, these lightweight but heavy duty ABS plastic tent stakes from ASR Outdoor boast it all.

The tent stakes feature pointed tips, large top stoppers and stringing eyelets for easy and quick installation. Featuring a lightweight but heavy duty design, these tent stakes feature single body ABS plastic construction, increasing ground anchor integrity, durability and longevity, as well as making installation and removal efficient. The purposeful lightweight design and material construction make these tent pegs ideal for camping, backpacking, hiking, mountaineering and more, as they won’t weigh your gear down in comparison to other heavier metal ground anchors.

Reliable and robust, these high visibility orange tent stakes can handle everything from multi person camping tents, tarp tie downs, landscaping projects, overhead installations for sporting events and much more; they’re suitable for use in dirt, sand, gravel and grassy terrains, giving you a diverse selection of ground anchoring possibilities. Their intentional high visibility orange colorway makes the tent stakes easy to spot with your camping gear, as well as in low or dim light environments if installation adjustments are needed.

Reach for these lightweight and incredibly sturdy tent stakes from ASR Outdoor come your next camping trip or backcountry adventure!

Dimensions: 11 x 2.5 x 1.25 inches

Single Stake Weight: 0.14lbs

Sold in packs of: 4, 6, 8, 10 and 21 Search Terms: Tent stakes pegs ground anchor camping gear essentials accessories tie down straps tents for camping tarp clips sporting goods pop up canopy backpacking gear tent hiking mountaineering soccer net abs plastic pergola outdoor gear wedding supplies Features: - CAMPING ESSENTIALS: ASR Outdoor heavy duty tent pegs feature unibody ABS plastic construction, making them a reliable choice to ensure camping tents or other shelter types are firmly secured; the tent stakes feature pointed tips, large stoppers and stringing eyelets for easy and quick installation - UNIBODY CONSTRUCTION: Lightweight but heavy duty, these ABS plastic material tent stakes feature single body construction, increasing the ground anchors integrity, durability and longevity, as well as making installation and removal more efficient - MULTIPURPOSE GROUND ANCHOR: Whether setting up a camping tent, canopy, for landscaping, tarp tie downs or overhead covering for sporting events or other, these heavy duty tent stakes can handle it all; suitable for use in grass, dirt, gravel and sand terrains - LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN FOR TRAVEL: Purposeful lightweight design and material construction make these tent pegs ideal for camping, backpacking, hiking, mountaineering and more, as they won’t weigh your gear down in comparison to heavier metal ground anchors - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 11 x 2.5 x 1.25 inches; Single Stake Weight: 0.14lbs; Color: High Visibility Orange; Sold in packs of: 4, 6, 8, 10 and 20 === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-pk 11 Inch Orange Heavy Duty Tent Stakes

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-pk 11 in Orange Tent Stakes

anthropic.title_differentiation: Unibody ABS Plastic, Lightweight Design, Multiple Terrains, Easy Installation, Multipurpose Ground Anchor

openai.title_differentiation: Unibody ABS Construction, Pointed Tips, Large Stoppers, Eyelets, Lightweight, Multi-Terrain Ground Anchor
